title: search — HTTP middleware
description: Three owned middleware. `search.rate-limit` enforces the per-workspace + per-user query rate cap from entitlements. `search.query-log` fires RecordSearchAnalyticsEventJob asynchronously so query latency stays flat. `search.owned-sync-job` gates job cancellation to the initiator or a platform admin.

middleware.role: Per-user + per-workspace query rate limit driven by the `search.max_query_rate_per_minute` entitlement. Applies on top of foundation's generic throttle. Refuses with 429 + SEARCH_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when either bucket exhausts. Bypasses for platform admins.

After the response is generated, dispatches RecordSearchAnalyticsEventJob with the query + result_count + took_ms + engine. Non-blocking — uses `terminate()` so the client already has the response. Skipped when `search.analytics.record` kill switch is off.

Resolves the `{jobId}` route parameter to a SearchSyncJob record. Refuses (404 with SEARCH_JOB_NOT_FOUND) when the caller is not the initiator AND does not hold `platform.search.sync-jobs.viewAny`. Runs after workspace.resolve so workspace scoping applies.

throttle_pools.name: search-query
throttle_pools.limit: 60 per minute per user + 300 per minute per workspace
throttle_pools.description: Query endpoint. Composes with search.rate-limit entitlement middleware.

throttle_pools.name: search-suggest
throttle_pools.description: Autocomplete — very high frequency. No workspace cap (cheap cache hits).
